_instructions.how_to_add_image: Copy an image block, paste it into 'items', update src, alt, category, and caption.
_instructions.how_to_add_video: Copy a video block, paste it into 'items', update src, title, category, and caption.
_instructions.image_folder: Put photos in /public/images/gallery/ then reference as /images/gallery/your-photo.jpg
_instructions.video_folder: Put videos in /public/videos/ then reference as /videos/your-video.mp4
_instructions.how_to_remove: Delete the { } block for the item you want to remove.
_instructions.how_to_reorder: Cut and paste blocks in the order you want them to appear.

sectionSubtitle: A glimpse into our programs, outreach activities, and the lives we are touching across Nigeria. Every image and video tells a story of resilience, hope, and transformation.
